services.name: Commercial Ads
services.headline: Ads that actually stop the scroll
services.description: Commercial shoots built for feeds, not just decks — made to hold attention in the first two seconds.
services.longDescription: Scripted and shot for the way people actually watch ads today: fast cuts, clear hooks, made for feed and reel placements. From concept to final edit, tailored to stop the scroll in the first two seconds.

services.name: Product Photography
services.headline: Make your product look like #1
services.description: Studio-grade product shoots that make people stop scrolling and tap buy.
services.longDescription: Studio-lit product shoots for e-commerce, catalogues, and social — clean cutouts, lifestyle context shots, and detail close-ups that make a product feel worth buying.

services.name: Architecture & Interior
services.headline: Spaces shot to sell themselves
services.description: Architecture and interior media that shows a space the way it feels to stand in it.
services.longDescription: Wide, considered frames that capture how a space feels to walk through, not just what it looks like from the doorway. Built for real estate listings, interior portfolios, and hospitality brands.

services.name: Fashion & Lifestyle
services.headline: Fashion shoots with an edge
services.description: Lifestyle and fashion content with a look, not just a look-book.
services.longDescription: Editorial-style shoots for apparel brands, boutiques, and personal labels — a look with attitude, not just a catalogue shot.

services.name: Personal Branding
services.headline: Look like the expert you are
services.description: Personal branding shoots for founders and professionals who need to be taken seriously online.
services.longDescription: Portraits and short-form video built for founders, consultants, and creators who need to look credible across LinkedIn, decks, and press.

services.name: Real Estate Media
services.headline: Listings that get booked faster
services.description: Real estate photo and video that gets a listing noticed before the open house.
services.longDescription: Photo and video packages for listings — walkthroughs and exteriors shot to get a property noticed before the open house.
